snp2.3:1.1: One who, flouting, despising a sense of shame,
snp2.3:1.3: but not grasping what he could do [to help]:
snp2.3:1.4: Know him as “Not one of mine.”
snp2.3:2.2: speaks endearing words to which he doesn’t conform,
snp2.3:3.1: He’s not a friend who’s always wary,
snp2.3:3.2: suspecting a split, focusing just on your weakness.
snp2.3:3.3: But him on whom you can depend, like a child on its parent’s breast:
snp2.3:3.4: That’s a true friend whom others can’t split from you.
snp2.3:4.3: the conditions that make for joy,
snp2.3:5.3: one is freed from evil, devoid of distress,
snp2.3:5.4: refreshed with the savor of rapture in the Dhamma.
